visual-anti-patterns.notes: One anti-pattern: builder panel labels (Shapes/Nature/Build/Friends, object names, AI suggestion chips) appear below 16px at tablet scale; no gradient backgrounds, orbs, nested cards, or dashboard clutter observed.

visual-child-friendly.notes: Playful tone with emojis, friendly Creative Buddy AI character, simple language, and large CTA buttons; minor deduction for small category-tab and object-label tap targets in the builder panel.

visual-consistency.notes: Unified purple/indigo primary color, consistent card radii, button styles, and font family across landing, builder, gallery, and theme-change views; slight nav-bar density shift between landing and builder is contextually appropriate.

visual-accessibility.notes: Good text-on-background contrast throughout and most interactive elements carry text labels; two icon-only toggle buttons in builder toolbar lack visible labels, no focus rings captured in any screenshot, and responsiveness is unverifiable from desktop-only captures.
